JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES GREEN/CLK:ECLAVRIA/RPTR:DIANA PADILLA C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. RALPH KOKKA APPEARED FOR PLTF LYRIC HOUSING ASSOCIATES, AND DEFT. BENJAMIN SOUTHARD PRESENT AND APPEARING PRO PER. CASE SETTLED AND TERMS & CONDITIONS STATED BY THE PRO TEM JUDGE - EMBODIED IN A "STIPULATION FOR ENTLRY OF JUDGMENT", WHICH WAS SIGNED BY PLTF'S COUNSEL (WHO WAS AUTHORIZED TO ENTER INTO THIS AGREEMENT BY PLTF), AND DEFT. DEFT UNDERSTOOD THE CONDITIONS AND AGREED TO COMPLY THEREWITH; THAT HE IS FULLY AWARE THAT IN CASE OF BREACH OF CONDITIONS OF THIS STIPULATION, PLTF ON 24 HOURS NOTICE WILL APPLY FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION AGAINST DEFT, FOR PROPERTY LOCATED AT THE LYRIC HOTEL,140 JONES STREET, ROOM 608, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, WITH STAY TO 6/6/98. COURT APPROVED THE STIPULATION.
